title: Menus - Adding and managing derived menus
workflow_title: Menus - Adding and managing derived menus

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Menus.
Give the derived menu a name.
Enable the option Is derived menu.
Choose the Base menu and the Store where the derived menu should be placed.
Below, manage the submenus: the trash icon turns a submenu/product off (it becomes a + to turn back on).
Then go to General, the sub-category General, and click Send to push the changes to your POS.
